recommendations.title: The 4th Floor
recommendations.overview: A woman inherits a rent-controlled apartment and is terrorized by a neighbor.

recommendations.title: Five Nights at Freddy's
recommendations.overview: Recently fired and desperate for work, a troubled young man named Mike agrees to take a position as a night security guard at an abandoned theme restaurant: Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria. But he soon discovers that nothing at Freddy's is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Havenhurst
recommendations.overview: A troubled young woman takes up residence in a gothic apartment building where she must confront a terrifying evil.

recommendations.title: Don't Tell a Soul
recommendations.overview: Two thieving teenage brothers, stealing money to help their sick mom, match wits with a troubled security guard stuck at the bottom of a forgotten well.

recommendations.title: Caveat
recommendations.overview: A lone drifter suffering from partial memory loss accepts a job to look after a psychologically troubled woman in an abandoned house on an isolated island.

recommendations.title: The Innocents
recommendations.overview: Four children become friends during the summer holidays, and out of sight of the adults they discover they have hidden powers. While exploring their newfound abilities in the nearby forests and playgrounds, their innocent play takes a dark turn and s

recommendations.title: P2
recommendations.overview: A businesswoman finds herself locked with a unhinged security guard in a parking garage after getting stuck working late on Christmas Eve.

recommendations.title: Barbarian
recommendations.overview: In town for a job interview, a young woman arrives at her Airbnb late at night only to find that it has been mistakenly double-booked and a strange man is already staying there. Against her better judgement, she decides to stay the night anyway.

recommendations.title: Exposed
recommendations.overview: After witnessing a miracle, a young Latina woman experiences strange things as a police detective searches for the truth behind his partner's death.

recommendations.title: Night Shift
